name: /audit-pack dry-run does not write a continuous learning evidence section to disk only previews it
command: mkdir -p compliance && printf '{"event":"pr-corpus-learn","pattern_id":"p1","at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"}\n' > compliance/audit.log && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --audit-log compliance/audit.log --dry-run --bundle-out bundle.zip 2>out.txt && [ ! -f bundle.zip ] && grep -q 'dry_run=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
